title: Life Makeover
subTitle: Simulation/Lifestyle/Dress-up/Casual
desc:
Life Makeover x Cardcaptor Sakura Collaboration Version is Live!
1. From Oct. 29 to Nov. 18, the new and limited Life Makeover x Cardcaptor Sakura collab Lightchase [Card Pact] brings new 5-Star Sets [Clear Prelude] and [Seal Release], and an SR Ally!
5-Star Set: Clear Prelude
Tomoyo designed and made this outfit, hoping to see Sakura on camera wearing it.
5-Star Set: Seal Release
Red outfit designed by Tomoyo, cute and lively yet practical for action.
2. Unsealing Key Value Pack sweeping in for the Card Pact!
3.Login Bonus: Card Encounter. Log in for Unsealing Key x15, 4-Star Fashion [Frozen Glow], and a total of 130 Diamonds!
4. New event [Popping Gifts]: Join for Life Makeover x Cardcaptor Sakura collaboration set!
5. Halloween Treat. Log in for festive gifts!
6. New events [Flavor Project], [Super Funfair], [Ocean Treasures], [Plant Care], and [Herb Aroma] on the way with many 5-star and 4-star sets!
7. From Nov. 7 to Nov. 27, 6-Star Set and an SSR Ally will encore in Lightchase [Landscape Thread!
8. From Nov. 12 to Dec. 2, 5-Star Sets and an SR Ally will encore in Lightchase [Rose Fantasy]!
9. Multiple timed Halloween recipes for purchase.
10. Sign-in Collection to craft - Specialty Holiday
11. Purchase Perk [Cutie Sizzle], Appearance Pack [Dream Starland], Appearance Pack [Bright Concentration], [Creep Lullaby] Pack, and popular appearance pack encore arriving soon.
Cross-Platform Brilliance
—Every detail of beauty deserves close appreciation.
Experience seamless gameplay across platforms with stunning 4K graphics, from hair and fabric rendering to realistic weather system. Invite your besties to interact in your personalized haven!
Next-Gen Character Customization
—127 new facial customization options to level up your beauty.
Sculpt the perfect look from forehead to chin, eyebrows to lips. Fine tune details in a larger and freer range. Your dream face is just a touch away!
Infinite Palette, Your Digital Wardrobe
—Unlock "infinity" for your digital wardrobe and RBG palette.
From dresses to lace trims, color and style fashions from 3-star tier to 6-star tier. Unlock breathtaking color-shifting effects with X Palette and X Starlight!
Design Your Own Fashion
—Become the chief designer of your own brand studio.
Select fabrics, adjust patterns, and create exclusive prints. Bring your designs from sketch to runway-ready reality.
Enhanced Photo-Shooting Experience
Capture your style with our upgraded photo system. Enjoy freed camera movement, advanced editing tools, and showcase your beauty with any form of composition.
Home Build 2.0: Advanced and Freed
—Advanced Build mode and building blocks.
Build your dream space with our grid-free placement system. Stack furniture, adjust heights, and rotate items at will. Plus, use our new building blocks with 144 color options for fantastic structures!
Lifelike Pet Companions
Immerse in ultra-realistic pet interactions. Feel the softness of a kitten's fur or gaze into a puppy's soulful eyes. Capture the cuteness firsthand and with no filter! Our highly free pet customization and AI-driven genetics system ensure each pet is uniquely yours.
Bring All Freedom-lovers Together
Share, inspire, and connect in Vvanna Community. Host virtual gatherings to catch up with your long-missed friends. Visit each other, cook dishes, decorate rooms, and save memories into your group photos.
A place of endless possibilities for every girl, Life Makeover endorses every dream and ignites every potential!
Official Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lifemakeover_global/
Official TikTok: www.tiktok.com/@lifemakeoverofficialOfficial
Official X: https://x.com/LifeMakeover510
To ensure a smooth gaming experience, please ensure your device meets the following minimum requirements of the game：
Android devices: Snapdragon 660, Kirin710 or above;
Minimum memory left: 4GB or above;
Supported system: Android 7.0 or above. (Settings > About Phone > Model)
